label: Quick Access — faster Today screen + greener frame
items: Opening Today (the planting + rain + tasks calendar) now loads frost dates straight from the cache instead of going through an edge function — a ~300-800ms speed-up on every visit after the first. The slow Gemini path only runs once per home per six months, exactly as before.
The whole Quick Access page now sits inside a thin green-bordered card with a soft white tint — gives the screen a more deliberate 'main page' feel.
Each Quick Access tile now has a faint green hairline border that matches the brand.
Visual Lens, Today, and Quick Capture sub-screens now start lower on the page so the back arrow and content aren't crowded by the floating menu button.

label: Behind the scenes
items: PlantingCalendarCard tries a direct Supabase read of `home_climate` on mount; only falls back to the edge function when the row is missing or older than 180 days. Same Gemini-backed refresh behaviour, much snappier feel on the common case.
All four /quick screens now use a consistent top padding that respects device safe-area-inset-top, so notched and dynamic-island phones look right out of the box.
